title: View Model
description: A mod that let you change the hands positions 👐
body: # View Model Mod By I-No-oNe ----------------- > ⚠️ **Important Notice** > > From now on, releases will be available **ONLY** on [**Modrinth**](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-ones-view-model), [**Github Releases**](https://github.com/I-No-oNe/View-Model/releases) won't get any updates, if you curious why, read about it [**here**](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/I-No-oNe/View-Model/refs/heads/26.1.x/assets/github_explanation.png). ----------------- ```yml How to use? # Install the latest version and install Midnight Config Lib. # Press the keybind V on your keyboard to open the GUI. # Set the sizes as you want with the sliders. # Turn on/off the settings as you want. ``` -------------------- ## Showcase: ### GUI: | **Transforms** | **Swing Settings** | | :---: | :---: | | | | | **Consumables** | **Misc** | | | | ### Setting The Keybind: ![Screenshot showcasing the View Model Keybind Open Menu set to V](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Pl8MehSU/images/c475af2a0d4a7b1efc97ba983aa5107874268913.png) -------------------- ### Mod Menu Integration: ![Mod Menu Integration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Pl8MehSU/images/a03c9e7810dd917d9a14b934f41d94d6db117253.png) ----------------- > 🛑 **Dependency Required** > > You MUST download [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) in order for this mod to work! ------------------ **thank you for using the mod** 🙏
